goal: Reverse engineer the existing three main menu button design system (layer model, composition rules, typography/icon constraints) before redrawing the Story button.
constraints: Do not redraw or replace button assets in this task.
Focus on extracting reproducible design rules from existing assets.
If source layered files are missing, mark exact-layer count as inferred from flattened PNGs.
deliverables: A written reverse-engineering spec for main menu button composition.
An inferred layer count model with per-layer responsibility.
A concrete redraw checklist for the next task.
